title: lasianthus brevipes
intro: Lasianthus brevipes, also known as the small-leaf lasianthus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Theaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lasianthus brevipes include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
